title: Forgiveness and Soft Regard
description: From grudges and reactivity toward friendliness, composure, and equal regard — with safety boundaries intact.
entry_queries: how do I stop holding grudges

steps.practice: Choose one small act of goodwill toward someone with whom you have tension, when doing so is safe and appropriate.
steps.reflection: Where is hatred, possessiveness, or ego blocking my capacity to be a friend?

steps.practice: Before reacting to criticism or praise, pause one breath and ask: will my response add turbulence?
steps.reflection: Do I unsettle others more than I realize — and do I let others unsettle me more than I need to?

steps.practice: Treat one compliment and one criticism today with the same inner steadiness — learn from both, cling to neither.
steps.reflection: Whose praise or insult still gets to decide whether I feel whole?
